description: Use this API to list “other” type models attached to 2-winding transformers. This API routine was first introduced in release 33.12.0 and 34.1.0. ierr = cct2wtd_list(sid, all, status)

parameters.name: sid
parameters.description: Valid subsystem identifier. valid subsystem identifiers range from 0 to 11. subsystem sid must have been previously defined (0 by default). (input).

parameters.name: all
parameters.description: All buses or specified subsystem flag (1 by default). (input).

all.description: process only buses in subsystem SID.

error_codes.description: invalid SID value or subsystem SID is not defined.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
